prices.source_block:
Standard garden admission is paid at the Gatehouse when you arrive. During special events and festivals, timed tickets are required. Rates below exclude special events, festivals and ticket add-ons.

Adult
Youth (3-17)

General Admission
$14
$5

MHS Members
FREE
FREE

EBT and WIC Card Max. 2 guests at discounted rate

$5
FREE

Kids 2 and under are FREE

hours.source_phrase: Standard Garden Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-7pm, last entry at 6:15pm; Friday-Sunday 10am-5pm, last entry at 4:15pm
hours.source_block:
Garden Season

April 1 - November 24, 2026

Standard Garden Hours:

Monday-Thursday 10am-7pm, last entry at 6:15pm

Friday-Sunday 10am-5pm, last entry at 4:15pm

The Garden closes early some days for private events. For today's hours, please refer to our On View Today section above.
